metadata.title: Tereos Açúcar e Energia S.A. — Global Leader in Sugar, Bioenergy & Agriculture
metadata.description: Tereos Açúcar e Energia S.A. is a Thailand-based global leader in sugar production, bioenergy, agricultural innovation, and sustainable food solutions. Day by day, cultivating the future.

overview.description: Tereos transforms sugar beet, sugar cane, wheat, corn and alfalfa into essential products for food, renewable energy, and industry — with more than 10,300 grower members worldwide.

sugar.description: World-class sugar production from cane to crystal, serving food, beverage, and industrial markets globally with uncompromising quality.

bioenergy.description: Renewable energy solutions including ethanol, biomass power, and next-generation biofuels driving the clean energy transition.

agriculture.description: Sustainable farming practices, agricultural services, and farmer partnership programs cultivating prosperity in rural communities.

food.description: Specialty ingredients, sweeteners, and functional solutions that enhance taste, texture, and nutrition for the global food industry.

renewable.title: Renewable Solutions
renewable.description: Circular economy innovations transforming agricultural byproducts into valuable resources for a sustainable tomorrow.

productsShowcase.title: Quality Products for a Sustainable World
productsShowcase.description: From sugar crystals to biofuels, our diverse product portfolio serves industries worldwide with uncompromising quality and sustainability.

sustainability.title: Our Sustainability Commitment
sustainability.description: We are committed to reducing our environmental footprint while increasing positive social impact across every aspect of our operations.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Tereos is the world's second largest sugar producer and a cooperative group with more than 10,300 grower members across 14 countries.
about.heroDescription: A leading cooperative in sugar, alcohol and starch — linking the agricultural world with society through sustainable plant-based solutions.
about.groupAgriculture: Creating a link between the agricultural world and society
about.governanceCtaDescription: Learn how our Board of Directors, committees, and Management Committee uphold transparency and accountability across the cooperative group.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Our approach to corporate governance — Board of Directors, committees, Cooperative Board, and management.

businesses.title: Our Businesses
businesses.description: Five integrated divisions powering global agriculture, energy, and food industries.

products.title: Activities & Products
products.description: Tereos is a leading cooperative group in the sugar, alcohol and starch markets — from sugar and sweeteners to ethanol, wheat proteins and native starches.
products.marketsDescription: Seven end-use markets served by Tereos ingredients and energy products worldwide.
products.marketsIndexDescription: Explore how Tereos products support food, energy, feed, chemistry, pharma, personal care, and paper industries.
products.productLinesDescription: Nine integrated product lines from cane sugar and bioethanol to fibres, proteins, and organic ingredients.
products.productLinesIndexDescription: Discover our full range of sugar, alcohol, starch, fibre, and protein product lines.
products.rawMaterialsDescription: Five agricultural raw materials at the heart of Tereos operations worldwide.

consumerBrands.title: Consumer Brands
consumerBrands.description: Tereos is present with consumer brands that are popular locally and recognized as labels of quality and innovation.
consumerBrands.intro1: Tereos is present on the market with well-established consumer brands. These brands represent quality, know-how and innovation in their local markets.
consumerBrands.intro2: From Béghin Say and La Perruche to TTD, Guarani and Sucreries de Bourbon, the portfolio reflects Tereos roots in sugar processing and long-standing customer trust.
consumerBrands.brandsDescription: Leading Tereos consumer brands in Europe, Brazil and Réunion Island.
consumerBrands.statRawMaterials: Tonnes of raw materials processed annually
consumerBrands.ctaDescription: Explore our B2B product catalog, markets, and product lines for food manufacturers and distributors.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Our CSR roadmap embodies credible commitments steered at the highest level — from regenerative agriculture to decarbonisation and ethical principles.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join 15,800 colleagues across 14 countries. Discover opportunities in a cooperative group shaping sustainable agriculture and plant-based solutions.
careers.whyDescription: As a cooperative, Tereos links growers, industry and customers worldwide. Our SUSTAIN'2030 programme and international mobility paths help you build a meaningful career.
careers.benefit1Desc: Work in a group owned by more than 10,300 grower members with a long-term vision.
careers.benefit2Desc: 38 industrial sites across 14 countries — from France and Brazil to Czech Republic and Thailand.
careers.benefit3Desc: Graduate and early-career programme combining rotations in agronomy, industry and CSR.
careers.benefit4Desc: Continuous training, apprenticeships, and leadership development at every level.
careers.openingsDescription: Find your next role in engineering, sustainability, operations, and more.
careers.applyDescription: Submit your application and our HR team will be in touch.
careers.applySuccess: Application submitted! We will contact you within 5 business days.
careers.applyError: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
careers.graduateDescription: International graduate programme with rotations across agronomy, industrial operations, and sustainable development.
careers.valuesDescription: The principles that guide how we work with colleagues, farmers, customers, and communities every day.
careers.testimonialsDescription: Hear from colleagues across engineering, agriculture, sustainability, and commercial teams.
careers.atsDescription: All applications are processed through our secure applicant tracking system. Create a profile to apply for multiple roles and track your progress.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Innovating to support the needs of a changing world — from agronomy and industrial process to energy, green chemistry, pharmacy and nutrition.
innovation.overviewTitle: Innovating to support the needs of a changing world
innovation.overviewDescription: We innovate across the entire value chain to anticipate market needs — developing sustainable agricultural practices, optimising industrial processes, and co-creating solutions with customers.

demo1.title: Next-Gen Biofuel Research
demo1.description: Developing second and third-generation biofuels from agricultural waste and algae for carbon-neutral energy.

demo2.title: Smart Agriculture IoT
demo2.description: IoT sensors and AI-powered analytics optimizing water usage, fertilizer application, and harvest timing.

demo3.title: Sustainable Crop Varieties
demo3.description: Researching drought-resistant and high-yield sugarcane varieties to improve farmer productivity.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.description: Our commitment to making tereosa.com accessible to all users in line with WCAG 2.1 AA.
accessibility.commitmentBody: Tereos Açúcar e Energia S.A. is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility.standardBody: This website aims to conform with WCAG 2.1 level AA. We test with automated tools (Lighthouse, axe) and manual keyboard navigation reviews as part of our release process.
accessibility.featuresBody:
• Skip-to-content link on every page
• Semantic HTML5 landmarks (header, main, footer)
• Keyboard-navigable menus and interactive map
• Visible focus indicators on all interactive elements
• prefers-reduced-motion support for animations
• Alt text on images and ARIA labels on icon-only controls
• Sufficient color contrast ratios (4.5:1 minimum for text)
• Responsive design supporting zoom up to 200%
accessibility.feedbackBody: If you encounter accessibility barriers on this site, please contact us. We aim to respond within 5 business days and will work with you to provide the information in an alternative format.

rawMaterials.title: Raw Materials
rawMaterials.description: Discover the agricultural raw materials at the heart of Tereos operations — sugar cane, sugar beet, wheat, corn, and alfalfa.
rawMaterials.intro: Tereos processes five major agricultural raw materials across our global operations. Each material undergoes sophisticated industrial transformation to produce a wide range of products for food, energy, feed, and industrial markets — while valorising virtually every fraction of the plant.

cultivateNetZero.title: Cultivate Net-Zero
cultivateNetZero.description: Our decarbonisation and regenerative agriculture offer — supporting industrial customers on the path to net-zero emissions.
cultivateNetZero.heroDescription: An exclusive programme to decarbonise your value chain through low-carbon sourcing, personalised carbon management, and regenerative agriculture partnerships.
cultivateNetZero.solutionsTitle: Three Solutions for Your Net-Zero Journey
cultivateNetZero.investmentDescription: Backed by significant investment and science-based targets, we are transforming our operations and supply chains to deliver measurable decarbonisation.
cultivateNetZero.farmerDescription: Tereos invests directly in farmer support programmes, covering diagnostics costs, partnering with transition organisations, and providing financial incentives for sustainable practices.
cultivateNetZero.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Net-Zero Journey?

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Building a sound, long-term cooperative model that creates value while serving essential daily needs.
strategy.heroDescription: How Tereos adapts to a changing agri-food landscape through diversification, value chain excellence, and circular economy principles.
strategy.relatedHistoryDesc: From a cooperative distillery in 1932 to a global agri-food group — discover our journey.
strategy.relatedInnovationDesc: How we pioneer new solutions in agronomy, energy, and nutrition.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.description: Cultivating for the Earth and People by meeting essential daily needs — our manifesto and guiding principles.
purpose.heroDescription: Discover the purpose that drives everything we do — from the field to the table, from energy to innovation.
purpose.manifesto: We are cultivators. We cultivate the land, we cultivate cooperation, we cultivate the link between nature and people. Since 1932, our cooperative has been rooted in the conviction that agricultural transformation can serve both the earth and humanity. From sugar beet to sugar cane, from wheat to alfalfa, we transform plant resources into products that nourish, energise, and improve daily life. This is our purpose.
purpose.pillarCultivatingDesc: Agriculture is our first profession. We support farmers in their daily practice, helping them adapt to climate change, adopt sustainable techniques, and build resilience for the future. Cultivating means nurturing the land that feeds us all.
purpose.pillarEarthPeopleDesc: Our cooperative name comes from the Greek 'tereos' — to protect, to preserve. We believe in reciprocity: what we take from the earth, we give back through sustainable practices, community investment, and environmental stewardship.
purpose.pillarDailyNeedsDesc: From the sugar in your morning coffee to the bioethanol powering your commute, from animal feed to pharmaceutical excipients — our products serve essential needs that touch millions of lives every day.
purpose.signature: Day by day, cultivating the future.
purpose.signatureDescription: This signature captures our identity — a cooperative rooted in patience, perseverance, and the conviction that each day's work builds a better tomorrow for the earth and for people.

history.title: History
history.description: From a cooperative distillery in Origny to a global agri-food group — our journey from 1932 to today.
history.heroDescription: Discover the key milestones that shaped Tereos from a small northern France distillery into a world-leading cooperative.

innovationPriority.title: Innovation
innovationPriority.description: Explore our six innovation priorities driving research and development across agronomy, energy, nutrition, and more.
